public class Solution { public int closestToTarget(int[] arr, int target) { int minDiff = Integer.MAX_VALUE; Set prefix = new HashSet<>(); for (int n : arr) { Set nextPrefix = computeNextPrefix(prefix, n); updateMinDifference(minDiff, nextPrefix, target); prefix = nextPrefix; } return minDiff; } private Set computeNextPrefix(Set prefix, int n) { Set nextPrefix = new HashSet<>(); for (int p : prefix) { nextPrefix.add(p & n); } nextPrefix.add(n); return nextPrefix; } private void updateMinDifference(int minDiff, Set nextPrefix, int target) { for (int p : nextPrefix) { minDiff = Math.min(minDiff, Math.abs(p - target)); } } }

public class Solution { public int maxNonOverlapping(int[] nums, int target) { Map prefixSum = new HashMap<>(); int sum = 0, count = 0; prefixSum.put(0, 0); List sums = Arrays.stream(nums) .map(num -> { sum += num; return sum; }) .filter(sum -> prefixSum.containsKey(sum - target)) .collect(Collectors.toList()); for (int s : sums) { count = Math.max(count, 1 + prefixSum.get(s - target)); } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int maxBoxesInWarehouse(int[] boxes, int[] warehouse) { int colCount = warehouse.length; for (int i = 1; i < colCount; i++) warehouse[i] = Math.min(warehouse[i], warehouse[i - 1]); Arrays.sort(boxes); int boxIndex = boxes.length - 1; int boxesCount = 0; for (int i = 0; i < colCount && boxIndex >= 0; i++) { if (boxes[boxIndex] <= warehouse[i]) { boxesCount++; boxIndex--; } } return boxesCount; } }
public class Solution { public int sumOddLengthSubarrays(int[] arr) { int sum = 0, n = arr.length; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { sum += arr[i] * ((i + 1) * (n - i) + 1) / 2; } return sum; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isPrintable(int[][] targetGrid) { int m = targetGrid.length, n = targetGrid[0].length; Map colorBounds = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) { for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { int color = targetGrid[i][j]; colorBounds.putIfAbsent(color, new int[] {i, j, i, j}); colorBounds.get(color)[0] = Math.min(colorBounds.get(color)[0], i); colorBounds.get(color)[1] = Math.min(colorBounds.get(color)[1], j); colorBounds.get(color)[2] = Math.max(colorBounds.get(color)[2], i); colorBounds.get(color)[3] = Math.max(colorBounds.get(color)[3], j); } } Set remainingColors = new HashSet<>(colorBounds.keySet()); while (!remainingColors.isEmpty()) { for (Iterator it = remainingColors.iterator(); it.hasNext();) { int color = it.next(); int[] bounds = colorBounds.get(color); boolean contained = true; for (int i = bounds[0]; i <= bounds[2] && contained; ++i) { for (int j = bounds[1]; j <= bounds[3]; ++j) { if (targetGrid[i][j] != color && targetGrid[i][j] != -1) { contained = false; break; } } } if (contained) { for (int i = bounds[0]; i <= bounds[2]; ++i) { for (int j = bounds[1]; j <= bounds[3]; ++j) { targetGrid[i][j] = -1; } } it.remove(); } else { return false; } } } return true; } }
public class Solution { public int minOperations(String[] logs) { return (int) Arrays.stream(logs) .filter(log -> !log.equals("./")) .mapToInt(log -> log.equals("../") ? -1 : 1) .sum(); } }

public class Solution { public int minOperationsMaxProfit(int[] customers, int boardingCost, int runningCost) { return computeMinOperationsMaxProfit(customers, boardingCost, runningCost); } private int computeMinOperationsMaxProfit(int[] customers, int boardingCost, int runningCost) { int waiting = 0; int profit = 0; int max_profit = 0; int rotations = 0; int result = -1; for (int i = 0; i < customers.length || waiting > 0; ++i) { if (i < customers.length) { waiting += customers[i]; } int boarding = Math.min(waiting, 4); waiting -= boarding; profit += boarding * boardingCost - runningCost; if (profit > max_profit) { max_profit = profit; result = rotations + 1; } rotations++; } return result; } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean isEvenOddTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return false; Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(root); int level = 0; while (!queue.isEmpty()) { int size = queue.size(); Integer prevVal = (level % 2 == 0) ? 0 : 1000001; // Check values in the current level for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) { TreeNode curr = queue.poll(); if ((level % 2 == 0 && (curr.val % 2 == 0 || curr.val <= prevVal)) || (level % 2 != 0 && (curr.val % 2 != 0 || curr.val >= prevVal))) { return false; } prevVal = curr.val; if (curr.left != null) queue.offer(curr.left); if (curr.right != null) queue.offer(curr.right); } level++; } return true; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public boolean canMakeArithmeticProgression(int[] arr) { Arrays.sort(arr); for (int i = 2; i < arr.length; i++) { if (arr[i] - arr[i - 1] != arr[1] - arr[0]) { return false; } } return true; } }

public class Solution { public int countVowelStrings(int n) { int[] dpTable = {1, 1, 1, 1, 1}; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 3; j >= 0; j--) { dpTable[j] = dpTable[j] + dpTable[j + 1]; } } return Arrays.stream(dpTable).sum(); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Collections; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public boolean canDistribute(int[] nums, int[] quantity) { Map counts = new HashMap<>(); for (int num : nums) { counts.put(num, counts.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1); } List values = new ArrayList<>(counts.values()); Arrays.sort(values, Collections.reverseOrder()); return dfs(0, values, quantity); } private boolean dfs(int index, List values, int[] quantity) { if (index == quantity.length) { return true; } for (int i = 0; i < values.size(); i++) { if (values.get(i) >= quantity[index]) { values.set(i, values.get(i) - quantity[index]); boolean result = dfs(index + 1, values, quantity); values.set(i, values.get(i) + quantity[index]); if (result) return true; } } return false; } }

public class Solution { int longestAwesomeSubstring(String s) { int n = s.length(); int maxLen = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { Set seenChars = new HashSet<>(); boolean isOddCountOne = true; for (int j = i; j <= n; ++j) { if (j > i && s.charAt(j - 1) != 'a') { // Assuming the string contains only lowercase letters char c = s.charAt(j - 1); if (!seenChars.contains(c)) { seenChars.add(c); } else { seenChars.remove(c); } } isOddCountOne &= (seenChars.size() <= 1); maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, j - i * isOddCountOne); } } return maxLen; } boolean isAwesome(String s) { int odd_count = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { freq[c - 'a']++; } for (int i = 0; i < 26; i++) { if (freq[i] % 2 == 1) { odd_count++; } } return (odd_count <= 1); } }

public class Solution { public int stoneGameV(int[] stoneValue) { int colCount = stoneValue.length; int[][] memo = new int[colCount][colCount]; return maxScore(stoneValue, 0, colCount - 1, memo); } private int maxScore(int[] stoneValue, int start, int end, int[][] memo) { if (start == end) return 0; if (memo[start][end] != 0) return memo[start][end]; int leftSum = 0, rightSum = 0; for (int i = start; i < end; ++i) { leftSum += stoneValue[i]; rightSum = 0; for (int j = i + 1; j <= end; ++j) rightSum += stoneValue[j]; if (leftSum > rightSum) memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], rightSum + maxScore(stoneValue, i + 1, end, memo)); else if (leftSum < rightSum) memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], leftSum + maxScore(stoneValue, start, i, memo)); else memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], leftSum + Math.max(maxScore(stoneValue, start, i, memo), maxScore(stoneValue, i + 1, end, memo))); } return memo[start][end]; } }

entries.instruction: Flatten the nested if-else chain in the movesToMakeZigzag method using guard clauses with early returns. The method has nested conditional logic that makes the control flow hard to follow. Restructure so each guard clause handles one case at the top and returns immediately. Remove all nesting after refactoring.

llm_calls.raw_response: public class Solution { public int movesToMakeZigzag(int[] nums) { int evenMoves = 0, oddMoves = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] >= Math.min(i > 0 ? nums[i - 1] : 1001, i < nums.length - 1 ? nums[i + 1] : 1001)) { int diff = nums[i] - Math.min(left, right) + 1; if (i % 2 == 0) { evenMoves += diff; } else { oddMoves += diff; } } } return Math.min(evenMoves, oddMoves); } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean btree_Game_Winning_Move(TreeNode root, int n, int x) { TreeNode xNode = findNode(root, x); int leftNodes = countNodes(xNode.left); int rightNodes = countNodes(xNode.right); int parentNodes = n - leftNodes - rightNodes - 1; return Math.max(Math.max(leftNodes, rightNodes), parentNodes) > n / 2; } public TreeNode findNode(TreeNode node, int x) { if (node == null) return null; if (node.val == x) return node; TreeNode leftSearch = findNode(node.left, x); if (leftSearch != null) return leftSearch; return findNode(node.right, x); } public boolean btree_Game_Winning_Move(TreeNode root, int n, int x) { TreeNode xNode = new TreeNode(); if (root == null) return false; if (root.val == x) xNode = root; else { TreeNode leftSearch = findNode(root.left, x); if (leftSearch != null) xNode = leftSearch; else xNode = findNode(root.right, x); } int leftNodes = countNodes(xNode.left); int rightNodes = countNodes(xNode.right); int parentNodes = n - leftNodes - rightNodes - 1; return Math.max(Math.max(leftNodes, rightNodes), parentNodes) > n / 2; } public int countNodes(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return 0; return countNodes(node.left) + countNodes(node.right) + 1; } }

public class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public int numPrimeArrangements(int n) { boolean[] isPrime = new boolean[n + 1]; Arrays.fill(isPrime, true); isPrime[0] = false; isPrime[1] = false; for (int i = 2; i * i <= n; i++) { if (isPrime[i]) { for (int j = i * i; j <= n; j += i) { isPrime[j] = false; } } } int primeCount = 0; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { if (isPrime[i]) primeCount++; } int compositeCount = n - primeCount; long res = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= primeCount; i++) { res = res * i % MOD; } for (int i = 1; i <= compositeCount; i++) { res = res * i % MOD; } return (int) res; } }

public class Solution { public int countLetters(String s) { int count = 0, current = 1; int sum; for (int i = 1; i < s.length(); i++) { if (s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(i - 1)) { current++; } else { sum = (current * (current + 1)) / 2; count += sum; current = 1; } } sum = (current * (current + 1)) / 2; count += sum; return count; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List shortestDistance(int[] colors, int[][] queries) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); List> positions = new ArrayList<>(3); for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) { positions.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) { positions.get(colors[i] - 1).add(i); } for (int[] query : queries) { List indexPositions = positions.get(query[1] - 1); if (!indexPositions.isEmpty()) { int dist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int pos : indexPositions) { dist = Math.min(dist, Math.abs(pos - query[0])); } result.add(dist); } else { result.add(-1); } } return result; } }

import java.util.PriorityQueue; public class Solution { public int minBuildTime(int[] blocks, int split) { PriorityQueue pq = new PriorityQueue<>(); for (int block : blocks) { pq.add(block); } while (pq.size() > 1) { int a = pq.poll(); int b = pq.poll(); pq.add(b + split); } return pq.poll(); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> minimumAbsDifference(int[] array) { Arrays.sort(array); int minDiff = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { minDiff = Math.min(minDiff, array[i] - array[i - 1]); } List> result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { if (array[i] - array[i - 1] == minDiff) { result.add(Arrays.asList(array[i - 1], array[i])); } } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int nthUglyNumber(int n, int a, int b, int c) { long left = 1, right = (long) 2e9; while (left < right) { long mid = left + (right - left) / 2; long gcd_ab = gcd(a, b), gcd_ac = gcd(a, c), gcd_bc = gcd(b, c); long lcm_ab = a / gcd_ab * b, lcm_ac = a / gcd_ac * c, lcm_bc = b / gcd_bc * c, lcm_abc = a / gcd_ab * lcm_bc; long count = mid / a + mid / b + mid / c - mid / lcm_ab - mid / lcm_ac - mid / lcm_bc + mid / lcm_abc; if (count < n) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return (int) left; long gcd(long a, long b) { return b == 0 ? a : gcd(b, a % b); } } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public String smallestStringWithSwaps(String s, int[][] pairs) { int n = s.length(); int[] p = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { p[i] = i; } Map> groups = new HashMap<>(); for (int[] pair : pairs) { int root1 = find(pair[0], p); int root2 = find(pair[1], p); if (root1 != root2) { p[root2] = root1; } } for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int root = find(i, p); groups.computeIfAbsent(root, k -> new PriorityQueue<>()).add(s.charAt(i)); } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int root = find(i, p); sb.append(groups.get(root).poll()); } return sb.toString(); } private int find(int x, int[] p) { if (p[x] != x) { p[x] = find(p[x], p); } return p[x]; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode() {} TreeNode(int val) { this.val = val; } TreeNode(int val, TreeNode left, TreeNode right) { this.val = val; this.left = left; this.right = right; } } public class Solution { public boolean twoSumBSTs(TreeNode root1, TreeNode root2, int target) { Set set = new HashSet<>(); buildSet(root1, set); if (root2 == null) return false; if (set.contains(target - root2.val)) return true; return findPair(root2.left, target, set) || findPair(root2.right, target, set); } private void buildSet(TreeNode root, Set set) { if (root == null) return; set.add(root.val); buildSet(root.left, set); buildSet(root.right, set); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List removeSubfolders(String[] folder) { return Arrays.stream(folder) .sorted() .filter(path -> !path.startsWith("/")) .collect(Collectors.toList()); } }

public class Solution { public String alphabetBoardPath(String target) { int x = 0, y = 0; StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (char c : target.toCharArray()) { int dx = (c - 'a') / 5; int dy = (c - 'a') % 5; // Move up while (x > dx) { sb.append('U'); x--; } // Move left while (y > dy) { sb.append('L'); y--; } // Move down while (x < dx) { sb.append('D'); x++; } // Move right while (y < dy) { sb.append('R'); y++; } sb.append('!'); } return sb.toString(); } }

public class Solution { public int minimumMoves(int[] array) { int[][] dpTable = new int[array.length][array.length]; for (int[] row : dpTable) Arrays.fill(row, -1); return minRemovals(array, 0, array.length - 1, dpTable); } private int minRemovals(int[] array, int i, int j, int[][] dpTable) { if (i > j) return 0; if (i == j) return 1; if (dpTable[i][j] != -1) return dpTable[i][j]; int result = minRemovals(array, i + 1, j, dpTable) + 1; for (int k = i + 1; k <= j; k++) { if (array[i] == array[k]) result = Math.min(result, minRemovals(array, i + 1, k - 1, dpTable) + minRemovals(array, k + 1, j, dpTable)); } return dpTable[i][j] = result; } }

class Solution { public boolean isGoodArray(int[] nums) { int res = nums[0]; for (int num : nums) { res = num == 0 ? a : gcd(res, num); } return res == 1; private int gcd(int a, int b) { return b == 0 ? a : gcd(b, a % b); } } }

public class Solution { public int closedIsland(int[][] grid) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < grid.length; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < grid[0].length; j++) { boolean isMatch = grid[i][j] == 0 && dfs(grid, i, j); if (isMatch) { count++; } } } return count; } private boolean dfs(int[][] grid, int i, int j) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= grid.length || j >= grid[0].length) { return false; } if (grid[i][j] == 1) { return true; } grid[i][j] = 1; boolean up = dfs(grid, i - 1, j); boolean down = dfs(grid, i + 1, j); boolean left = dfs(grid, i, j - 1); boolean right = dfs(grid, i, j + 1); return up && down && left && right; } }

public class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public int numberOfWays(int numPeople) { int[] dp = new int[numPeople / 2 + 1]; dp[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= numPeople / 2; ++i) { for (int j = 1; j <= i; ++j) { dp[i] = (dp[i] + (int)(((long) dp[i - j] * dp[j - 1]) % MOD )) % MOD; } } return dp[numPeople / 2]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public List> groupThePeople(int[] groupSizes) { Map> groups = new HashMap<>(); List> result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < groupSizes.length; i++) { computeGroupThePeople(groups, groupSizes[i], i); } return result; } private void computeGroupThePeople(Map> groups, int size, int index) { groups.computeIfAbsent(size, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(index); if (groups.get(size).size() == size) { groupSizes[index] = -1; // Mark as processed } } }

import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public List pathsWithMaxScore(List board) { int n = board.size(); int[][] dp = new int[n][n]; int[][] cnt = new int[n][n]; board.set(0, "0" + board.get(0).substring(1)); board.set(n-1, board.get(n-1).substring(0, n - 1) + "0"); cnt[n-1][n-1] = 1; for (int i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) { for (int j = n-1; j >= 0; j--) { if (board.get(i).charAt(j) != 'X') { int[][] neighbors = {{i-1, j}, {i, j-1}, {i-1, j-1}}; for (int[] neighbor : neighbors) { int x = neighbor[0], y = neighbor[1]; if(x >= 0 && y >= 0) { if (dp[i][j] < dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0') { dp[i][j] = dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0'; cnt[i][j] = cnt[x][y]; } else if (dp[i][j] == dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0') { cnt[i][j] = (cnt[i][j] + cnt[x][y]) % MOD; } } } } } } return Arrays.asList(dp[0][0], cnt[0][0]); } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public int minSetSize(int[] arr) { Map freq_map = new HashMap<>(); for (int x : arr) freq_map.put(x, freq_map.getOrDefault(x, 0) + 1); int half = arr.length / 2; int cnt = 0; int size = 0; for (int cnt_val : freq_map.values()) { if ((size += cnt_val) >= half) return ++cnt; } return cnt; } }

public class Solution { int[] dx = {-1, 1, 0, 0}; int[] dy = {0, 0, -1, 1}; void dfs(int[][] grid, int x, int y) { int n = grid.length, m = grid[0].length; grid[x][y] = 1; for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) { int nx = x + dx[i], ny = y + dy[i]; if (nx >= 0 && nx < n && ny >= 0 && ny < m && grid[nx][ny] == 0) { dfs(grid, nx, ny); } } } public int closedIsland(int[][] grid) { int n = grid.length, m = grid[0].length; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < m; j++) { if (i == 0 || i == n - 1 || j == 0 || j == m - 1) { if (grid[i][j] == 0) { dfs(grid, i, j); } return 0; } } } int res = 0; for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < m - 1; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 0) { dfs(grid, i, j); res++; } } } return res; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode() {} TreeNode(int val) { this.val = val; } TreeNode(int val, TreeNode left, TreeNode right) { this.val = val; this.left = left; this.right = right; } } class Solution { public TreeNode balanceBST(TreeNode root) { List sortedNodes = new ArrayList<>(); inorderTraversal(root, sortedNodes); if (sortedNodes.isEmpty()) return null; int mid = sortedNodes.size() / 2; TreeNode newNode = sortedNodes.get(mid); newNode.left = balanceBST(sortedNodes.subList(0, mid)); newNode.right = balanceBST(sortedNodes.subList(mid + 1, sortedNodes.size())); return newNode; } private void inorderTraversal(TreeNode node, List sortedNodes) { if (node == null) return; inorderTraversal(node.left, sortedNodes); sortedNodes.add(node); inorderTraversal(node.right, sortedNodes); } }

public class Solution { public int findTheDistanceValue(int[] arr1, int[] arr2, int d) { for (int a : arr1) { boolean found = false; for (int b : arr2) { if (Math.abs(a - b) <= d) { return 0; // Early return when condition is met } } } return arr1.length; // Return the length of arr1 if no early return occurred } }

public class Solution { public int maxSumDivThree(int[] nums) { int[] dp = new int[3]; for (int num : nums) { updateDP(dp, num); } return dp[0]; } private void updateDP(int[] dp, int num) { int[] temp = Arrays.copyOf(dp, 3); for (int s : temp) { dp[(s + num) % 3] = Math.max(dp[(s + num) % 3], s + num); } } }

public class Solution { public String stoneGameIII(int[] stoneValue) { int n = stoneValue.length; int[] dp = new int[n + 1]; dp[n] = 0; for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) { dp[i] = Integer.MIN_VALUE; for (int j = 0, curr = 0; j < 3 && i + j < n; ++j) { curr += stoneValue[i + j]; dp[i] = Math.max(dp[i], curr - dp[i + j + 1]); } } return dp[0] == 0 ? "Tie " : dp[0] > 0 ? "Alice " : "Bob "; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; class Solution { public void generateStrings(int n, StringBuilder current, List strings) { if (n == 0) { strings.add(current.toString()); return; } for (char c = 'a'; c <= 'c'; ++c) { if (current.length() == 0 || current.charAt(current.length() - 1) != c) { current.append(c); generateStrings(n - 1, current, strings); current.deleteCharAt(current.length() - 1); } } // Inline getHappyString helper method if (n == 0 && k <= strings.size()) { System.out.println(strings.get(k - 1)); } } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public String reformat(String s) { Queue letters = new LinkedList<>(); Queue digits = new LinkedList<>(); for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (Character.isLetter(c)) letters.add(c); else digits.add(c); } if (Math.abs(letters.size() - digits.size()) > 1) return ""; StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder(); boolean useLetter = letters.size() > digits.size(); while ((isConditionMet = !letters.isEmpty() || !digits.isEmpty())) { if (useLetter) { result.append(letters.poll()); } else { result.append(digits.poll()); } useLetter = !useLetter; } return result.toString(); } }

import java.util.ArrayDeque; import java.util.Deque; public class Solution { public int longestSubarray(int[] nums, int limit) { Deque maxDeque = new ArrayDeque<>(); Deque minDeque = new ArrayDeque<>(); int left = 0, right = 0, longest = 0; while (right < nums.length) { // Maintain the deque in decreasing order while (!maxDeque.isEmpty() && nums[right] > maxDeque.peekLast()) { maxDeque.pollLast(); } // Maintain the deque in increasing order while (!minDeque.isEmpty() && nums[right] < minDeque.peekLast()) { minDeque.pollLast(); } maxDeque.offerLast(nums[right]); minDeque.offerLast(nums[right]); // Adjust the window if it violates the limit while (maxDeque.peekFirst() - minDeque.peekFirst() > limit) { if (nums[left] == maxDeque.peekFirst()) { maxDeque.pollFirst(); } if (nums[left] == minDeque.peekFirst()) { minDeque.pollFirst(); } left++; } // Update the longest subarray length longest = Math.max(longest, right - left + 1); right++; } return longest; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.ArrayList; public class Solution { public List checkIfPrerequisite(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites, int[][] queries) { boolean[][] adj_matrix = new boolean[numCourses][numCourses]; for (int[] pre : prerequisites) { adj_matrix[pre[0]][pre[1]] = true; } // Consolidate the loops into a single pass for (int k = 0; k < numCourses; k++) { for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < numCourses && j < numCourses;) { if (!adj_matrix[i][j]) { adj_matrix[i][j] = adj_matrix[i][k] && adj_matrix[k][j]; } if (++j == numCourses) { i++; j = 0; } } } List answer = new ArrayList<>(); for (int[] query : queries) { answer.add(adj_matrix[query[0]][query[1]]); } return answer; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public int maxSumBST(TreeNode root) { int[] maxSum = new int[1]; if (root == null) { return 0; } int[] left = helper(root.left, maxSum); int[] right = helper(root.right, maxSum); if (left[3] != 0 && right[3] != 0 && root.val > left[1] && root.val < right[0]) { int sum = root.val + left[2] + right[2]; maxSum[0] = Math.max(maxSum[0], sum); return new int[]{Math.min(root.val, left[0]), Math.max(root.val, right[1]), sum, 1}; } return new int[]{0, 0, 0, 0}; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findLeastNumOfUniqueInts(int[] arr, int k) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); PriorityQueue> pq = new PriorityQueue<>((a, b) -> a.getValue().compareTo(b.getValue())); for (int n : arr) { count.put(n, count.getOrDefault(n, 0) + 1); } for (Map.Entry entry : count.entrySet()) { pq.add(entry); } while (k > 0 && !pq.isEmpty()) { k -= pq.poll().getValue(); } return k == 0 ? pq.size() : pq.size() + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int countPrefixAligned(int[] flips) { return computeCountPrefixAligned(flips); } private int computeCountPrefixAligned(int[] flips) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < flips.length; i++) { if (flips[i] == i + 1) { count++; } } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int numSubmat(int[][] mat) { int m = mat.length, n = mat[0].length; int[][] dp = new int[m][n]; int ans = 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (mat[i][j] == 1) { dp[i][j] = j == 0 ? 1 : dp[i][j-1] + 1; int width = dp[i][j]; for (int k = i, count = 0; k >= 0 && mat[k][j] != 0; k--) { width = Math.min(width, dp[k][j]); ans += ++count * width; } } } } return ans; } }

public class Solution { public int closestToTarget(int[] arr, int target) { int minDiff = Integer.MAX_VALUE; Set prefix = new HashSet<>(); for (int n : arr) { Set nextPrefix = computeNextPrefix(prefix, n); updateMinDifference(minDiff, nextPrefix, target); prefix = nextPrefix; } return minDiff; } private Set computeNextPrefix(Set prefix, int n) { Set nextPrefix = new HashSet<>(); for (int p : prefix) { nextPrefix.add(p & n); } nextPrefix.add(n); return nextPrefix; } private void updateMinDifference(int minDiff, Set nextPrefix, int target) { for (int p : nextPrefix) { minDiff = Math.min(minDiff, Math.abs(p - target)); } } }

public class Solution { public int maxNonOverlapping(int[] nums, int target) { Map prefixSum = new HashMap<>(); int sum = 0, count = 0; prefixSum.put(0, 0); List sums = Arrays.stream(nums) .map(num -> { sum += num; return sum; }) .filter(sum -> prefixSum.containsKey(sum - target)) .collect(Collectors.toList()); for (int s : sums) { count = Math.max(count, 1 + prefixSum.get(s - target)); } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int maxBoxesInWarehouse(int[] boxes, int[] warehouse) { int colCount = warehouse.length; for (int i = 1; i < colCount; i++) warehouse[i] = Math.min(warehouse[i], warehouse[i - 1]); Arrays.sort(boxes); int boxIndex = boxes.length - 1; int boxesCount = 0; for (int i = 0; i < colCount && boxIndex >= 0; i++) { if (boxes[boxIndex] <= warehouse[i]) { boxesCount++; boxIndex--; } } return boxesCount; } }
public class Solution { public int sumOddLengthSubarrays(int[] arr) { int sum = 0, n = arr.length; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { sum += arr[i] * ((i + 1) * (n - i) + 1) / 2; } return sum; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isPrintable(int[][] targetGrid) { int m = targetGrid.length, n = targetGrid[0].length; Map colorBounds = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) { for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { int color = targetGrid[i][j]; colorBounds.putIfAbsent(color, new int[] {i, j, i, j}); colorBounds.get(color)[0] = Math.min(colorBounds.get(color)[0], i); colorBounds.get(color)[1] = Math.min(colorBounds.get(color)[1], j); colorBounds.get(color)[2] = Math.max(colorBounds.get(color)[2], i); colorBounds.get(color)[3] = Math.max(colorBounds.get(color)[3], j); } } Set remainingColors = new HashSet<>(colorBounds.keySet()); while (!remainingColors.isEmpty()) { for (Iterator it = remainingColors.iterator(); it.hasNext();) { int color = it.next(); int[] bounds = colorBounds.get(color); boolean contained = true; for (int i = bounds[0]; i <= bounds[2] && contained; ++i) { for (int j = bounds[1]; j <= bounds[3]; ++j) { if (targetGrid[i][j] != color && targetGrid[i][j] != -1) { contained = false; break; } } } if (contained) { for (int i = bounds[0]; i <= bounds[2]; ++i) { for (int j = bounds[1]; j <= bounds[3]; ++j) { targetGrid[i][j] = -1; } } it.remove(); } else { return false; } } } return true; } }
public class Solution { public int minOperations(String[] logs) { return (int) Arrays.stream(logs) .filter(log -> !log.equals("./")) .mapToInt(log -> log.equals("../") ? -1 : 1) .sum(); } }

public class Solution { public int minOperationsMaxProfit(int[] customers, int boardingCost, int runningCost) { return computeMinOperationsMaxProfit(customers, boardingCost, runningCost); } private int computeMinOperationsMaxProfit(int[] customers, int boardingCost, int runningCost) { int waiting = 0; int profit = 0; int max_profit = 0; int rotations = 0; int result = -1; for (int i = 0; i < customers.length || waiting > 0; ++i) { if (i < customers.length) { waiting += customers[i]; } int boarding = Math.min(waiting, 4); waiting -= boarding; profit += boarding * boardingCost - runningCost; if (profit > max_profit) { max_profit = profit; result = rotations + 1; } rotations++; } return result; } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean isEvenOddTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return false; Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(root); int level = 0; while (!queue.isEmpty()) { int size = queue.size(); Integer prevVal = (level % 2 == 0) ? 0 : 1000001; // Check values in the current level for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) { TreeNode curr = queue.poll(); if ((level % 2 == 0 && (curr.val % 2 == 0 || curr.val <= prevVal)) || (level % 2 != 0 && (curr.val % 2 != 0 || curr.val >= prevVal))) { return false; } prevVal = curr.val; if (curr.left != null) queue.offer(curr.left); if (curr.right != null) queue.offer(curr.right); } level++; } return true; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public boolean canMakeArithmeticProgression(int[] arr) { Arrays.sort(arr); for (int i = 2; i < arr.length; i++) { if (arr[i] - arr[i - 1] != arr[1] - arr[0]) { return false; } } return true; } }

public class Solution { public int countVowelStrings(int n) { int[] dpTable = {1, 1, 1, 1, 1}; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 3; j >= 0; j--) { dpTable[j] = dpTable[j] + dpTable[j + 1]; } } return Arrays.stream(dpTable).sum(); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Collections; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public boolean canDistribute(int[] nums, int[] quantity) { Map counts = new HashMap<>(); for (int num : nums) { counts.put(num, counts.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1); } List values = new ArrayList<>(counts.values()); Arrays.sort(values, Collections.reverseOrder()); return dfs(0, values, quantity); } private boolean dfs(int index, List values, int[] quantity) { if (index == quantity.length) { return true; } for (int i = 0; i < values.size(); i++) { if (values.get(i) >= quantity[index]) { values.set(i, values.get(i) - quantity[index]); boolean result = dfs(index + 1, values, quantity); values.set(i, values.get(i) + quantity[index]); if (result) return true; } } return false; } }

public class Solution { int longestAwesomeSubstring(String s) { int n = s.length(); int maxLen = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { Set seenChars = new HashSet<>(); boolean isOddCountOne = true; for (int j = i; j <= n; ++j) { if (j > i && s.charAt(j - 1) != 'a') { // Assuming the string contains only lowercase letters char c = s.charAt(j - 1); if (!seenChars.contains(c)) { seenChars.add(c); } else { seenChars.remove(c); } } isOddCountOne &= (seenChars.size() <= 1); maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, j - i * isOddCountOne); } } return maxLen; } boolean isAwesome(String s) { int odd_count = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { freq[c - 'a']++; } for (int i = 0; i < 26; i++) { if (freq[i] % 2 == 1) { odd_count++; } } return (odd_count <= 1); } }

public class Solution { public int stoneGameV(int[] stoneValue) { int colCount = stoneValue.length; int[][] memo = new int[colCount][colCount]; return maxScore(stoneValue, 0, colCount - 1, memo); } private int maxScore(int[] stoneValue, int start, int end, int[][] memo) { if (start == end) return 0; if (memo[start][end] != 0) return memo[start][end]; int leftSum = 0, rightSum = 0; for (int i = start; i < end; ++i) { leftSum += stoneValue[i]; rightSum = 0; for (int j = i + 1; j <= end; ++j) rightSum += stoneValue[j]; if (leftSum > rightSum) memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], rightSum + maxScore(stoneValue, i + 1, end, memo)); else if (leftSum < rightSum) memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], leftSum + maxScore(stoneValue, start, i, memo)); else memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], leftSum + Math.max(maxScore(stoneValue, start, i, memo), maxScore(stoneValue, i + 1, end, memo))); } return memo[start][end]; } }

entries.instruction: Inline the private findNode helper method directly into its caller btree_Game_Winning_Move. Replace each call to findNode(...) with the method body at the call site. Then remove the findNode method declaration entirely.

llm_calls.raw_response: public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean btree_Game_Winning_Move(TreeNode root, int n, int x) { TreeNode xNode = findNode(root, x); int leftNodes = countNodes(xNode.left); int rightNodes = countNodes(xNode.right); int parentNodes = n - leftNodes - rightNodes - 1; return Math.max(Math.max(leftNodes, rightNodes), parentNodes) > n / 2; } public TreeNode findNode(TreeNode node, int x) { if (node == null) return null; if (node.val == x) return node; TreeNode leftSearch = findNode(node.left, x); if (leftSearch != null) return leftSearch; return findNode(node.right, x); } public boolean btree_Game_Winning_Move(TreeNode root, int n, int x) { TreeNode xNode = new TreeNode(); if (root == null) return false; if (root.val == x) xNode = root; else { TreeNode leftSearch = findNode(root.left, x); if (leftSearch != null) xNode = leftSearch; else xNode = findNode(root.right, x); } int leftNodes = countNodes(xNode.left); int rightNodes = countNodes(xNode.right); int parentNodes = n - leftNodes - rightNodes - 1; return Math.max(Math.max(leftNodes, rightNodes), parentNodes) > n / 2; } public int countNodes(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return 0; return countNodes(node.left) + countNodes(node.right) + 1; } }

public class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public int numPrimeArrangements(int n) { boolean[] isPrime = new boolean[n + 1]; Arrays.fill(isPrime, true); isPrime[0] = false; isPrime[1] = false; for (int i = 2; i * i <= n; i++) { if (isPrime[i]) { for (int j = i * i; j <= n; j += i) { isPrime[j] = false; } } } int primeCount = 0; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { if (isPrime[i]) primeCount++; } int compositeCount = n - primeCount; long res = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= primeCount; i++) { res = res * i % MOD; } for (int i = 1; i <= compositeCount; i++) { res = res * i % MOD; } return (int) res; } }

public class Solution { public int countLetters(String s) { int count = 0, current = 1; int sum; for (int i = 1; i < s.length(); i++) { if (s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(i - 1)) { current++; } else { sum = (current * (current + 1)) / 2; count += sum; current = 1; } } sum = (current * (current + 1)) / 2; count += sum; return count; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List shortestDistance(int[] colors, int[][] queries) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); List> positions = new ArrayList<>(3); for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) { positions.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) { positions.get(colors[i] - 1).add(i); } for (int[] query : queries) { List indexPositions = positions.get(query[1] - 1); if (!indexPositions.isEmpty()) { int dist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int pos : indexPositions) { dist = Math.min(dist, Math.abs(pos - query[0])); } result.add(dist); } else { result.add(-1); } } return result; } }

import java.util.PriorityQueue; public class Solution { public int minBuildTime(int[] blocks, int split) { PriorityQueue pq = new PriorityQueue<>(); for (int block : blocks) { pq.add(block); } while (pq.size() > 1) { int a = pq.poll(); int b = pq.poll(); pq.add(b + split); } return pq.poll(); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> minimumAbsDifference(int[] array) { Arrays.sort(array); int minDiff = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { minDiff = Math.min(minDiff, array[i] - array[i - 1]); } List> result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { if (array[i] - array[i - 1] == minDiff) { result.add(Arrays.asList(array[i - 1], array[i])); } } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int nthUglyNumber(int n, int a, int b, int c) { long left = 1, right = (long) 2e9; while (left < right) { long mid = left + (right - left) / 2; long gcd_ab = gcd(a, b), gcd_ac = gcd(a, c), gcd_bc = gcd(b, c); long lcm_ab = a / gcd_ab * b, lcm_ac = a / gcd_ac * c, lcm_bc = b / gcd_bc * c, lcm_abc = a / gcd_ab * lcm_bc; long count = mid / a + mid / b + mid / c - mid / lcm_ab - mid / lcm_ac - mid / lcm_bc + mid / lcm_abc; if (count < n) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return (int) left; long gcd(long a, long b) { return b == 0 ? a : gcd(b, a % b); } } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public String smallestStringWithSwaps(String s, int[][] pairs) { int n = s.length(); int[] p = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { p[i] = i; } Map> groups = new HashMap<>(); for (int[] pair : pairs) { int root1 = find(pair[0], p); int root2 = find(pair[1], p); if (root1 != root2) { p[root2] = root1; } } for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int root = find(i, p); groups.computeIfAbsent(root, k -> new PriorityQueue<>()).add(s.charAt(i)); } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int root = find(i, p); sb.append(groups.get(root).poll()); } return sb.toString(); } private int find(int x, int[] p) { if (p[x] != x) { p[x] = find(p[x], p); } return p[x]; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode() {} TreeNode(int val) { this.val = val; } TreeNode(int val, TreeNode left, TreeNode right) { this.val = val; this.left = left; this.right = right; } } public class Solution { public boolean twoSumBSTs(TreeNode root1, TreeNode root2, int target) { Set set = new HashSet<>(); buildSet(root1, set); if (root2 == null) return false; if (set.contains(target - root2.val)) return true; return findPair(root2.left, target, set) || findPair(root2.right, target, set); } private void buildSet(TreeNode root, Set set) { if (root == null) return; set.add(root.val); buildSet(root.left, set); buildSet(root.right, set); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List removeSubfolders(String[] folder) { return Arrays.stream(folder) .sorted() .filter(path -> !path.startsWith("/")) .collect(Collectors.toList()); } }

public class Solution { public String alphabetBoardPath(String target) { int x = 0, y = 0; StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (char c : target.toCharArray()) { int dx = (c - 'a') / 5; int dy = (c - 'a') % 5; // Move up while (x > dx) { sb.append('U'); x--; } // Move left while (y > dy) { sb.append('L'); y--; } // Move down while (x < dx) { sb.append('D'); x++; } // Move right while (y < dy) { sb.append('R'); y++; } sb.append('!'); } return sb.toString(); } }

public class Solution { public int minimumMoves(int[] array) { int[][] dpTable = new int[array.length][array.length]; for (int[] row : dpTable) Arrays.fill(row, -1); return minRemovals(array, 0, array.length - 1, dpTable); } private int minRemovals(int[] array, int i, int j, int[][] dpTable) { if (i > j) return 0; if (i == j) return 1; if (dpTable[i][j] != -1) return dpTable[i][j]; int result = minRemovals(array, i + 1, j, dpTable) + 1; for (int k = i + 1; k <= j; k++) { if (array[i] == array[k]) result = Math.min(result, minRemovals(array, i + 1, k - 1, dpTable) + minRemovals(array, k + 1, j, dpTable)); } return dpTable[i][j] = result; } }

class Solution { public boolean isGoodArray(int[] nums) { int res = nums[0]; for (int num : nums) { res = num == 0 ? a : gcd(res, num); } return res == 1; private int gcd(int a, int b) { return b == 0 ? a : gcd(b, a % b); } } }

public class Solution { public int closedIsland(int[][] grid) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < grid.length; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < grid[0].length; j++) { boolean isMatch = grid[i][j] == 0 && dfs(grid, i, j); if (isMatch) { count++; } } } return count; } private boolean dfs(int[][] grid, int i, int j) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= grid.length || j >= grid[0].length) { return false; } if (grid[i][j] == 1) { return true; } grid[i][j] = 1; boolean up = dfs(grid, i - 1, j); boolean down = dfs(grid, i + 1, j); boolean left = dfs(grid, i, j - 1); boolean right = dfs(grid, i, j + 1); return up && down && left && right; } }

public class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public int numberOfWays(int numPeople) { int[] dp = new int[numPeople / 2 + 1]; dp[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= numPeople / 2; ++i) { for (int j = 1; j <= i; ++j) { dp[i] = (dp[i] + (int)(((long) dp[i - j] * dp[j - 1]) % MOD )) % MOD; } } return dp[numPeople / 2]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public List> groupThePeople(int[] groupSizes) { Map> groups = new HashMap<>(); List> result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < groupSizes.length; i++) { computeGroupThePeople(groups, groupSizes[i], i); } return result; } private void computeGroupThePeople(Map> groups, int size, int index) { groups.computeIfAbsent(size, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(index); if (groups.get(size).size() == size) { groupSizes[index] = -1; // Mark as processed } } }

import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public List pathsWithMaxScore(List board) { int n = board.size(); int[][] dp = new int[n][n]; int[][] cnt = new int[n][n]; board.set(0, "0" + board.get(0).substring(1)); board.set(n-1, board.get(n-1).substring(0, n - 1) + "0"); cnt[n-1][n-1] = 1; for (int i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) { for (int j = n-1; j >= 0; j--) { if (board.get(i).charAt(j) != 'X') { int[][] neighbors = {{i-1, j}, {i, j-1}, {i-1, j-1}}; for (int[] neighbor : neighbors) { int x = neighbor[0], y = neighbor[1]; if(x >= 0 && y >= 0) { if (dp[i][j] < dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0') { dp[i][j] = dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0'; cnt[i][j] = cnt[x][y]; } else if (dp[i][j] == dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0') { cnt[i][j] = (cnt[i][j] + cnt[x][y]) % MOD; } } } } } } return Arrays.asList(dp[0][0], cnt[0][0]); } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public int minSetSize(int[] arr) { Map freq_map = new HashMap<>(); for (int x : arr) freq_map.put(x, freq_map.getOrDefault(x, 0) + 1); int half = arr.length / 2; int cnt = 0; int size = 0; for (int cnt_val : freq_map.values()) { if ((size += cnt_val) >= half) return ++cnt; } return cnt; } }

public class Solution { int[] dx = {-1, 1, 0, 0}; int[] dy = {0, 0, -1, 1}; void dfs(int[][] grid, int x, int y) { int n = grid.length, m = grid[0].length; grid[x][y] = 1; for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) { int nx = x + dx[i], ny = y + dy[i]; if (nx >= 0 && nx < n && ny >= 0 && ny < m && grid[nx][ny] == 0) { dfs(grid, nx, ny); } } } public int closedIsland(int[][] grid) { int n = grid.length, m = grid[0].length; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < m; j++) { if (i == 0 || i == n - 1 || j == 0 || j == m - 1) { if (grid[i][j] == 0) { dfs(grid, i, j); } return 0; } } } int res = 0; for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < m - 1; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 0) { dfs(grid, i, j); res++; } } } return res; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode() {} TreeNode(int val) { this.val = val; } TreeNode(int val, TreeNode left, TreeNode right) { this.val = val; this.left = left; this.right = right; } } class Solution { public TreeNode balanceBST(TreeNode root) { List sortedNodes = new ArrayList<>(); inorderTraversal(root, sortedNodes); if (sortedNodes.isEmpty()) return null; int mid = sortedNodes.size() / 2; TreeNode newNode = sortedNodes.get(mid); newNode.left = balanceBST(sortedNodes.subList(0, mid)); newNode.right = balanceBST(sortedNodes.subList(mid + 1, sortedNodes.size())); return newNode; } private void inorderTraversal(TreeNode node, List sortedNodes) { if (node == null) return; inorderTraversal(node.left, sortedNodes); sortedNodes.add(node); inorderTraversal(node.right, sortedNodes); } }

public class Solution { public int findTheDistanceValue(int[] arr1, int[] arr2, int d) { for (int a : arr1) { boolean found = false; for (int b : arr2) { if (Math.abs(a - b) <= d) { return 0; // Early return when condition is met } } } return arr1.length; // Return the length of arr1 if no early return occurred } }

public class Solution { public int maxSumDivThree(int[] nums) { int[] dp = new int[3]; for (int num : nums) { updateDP(dp, num); } return dp[0]; } private void updateDP(int[] dp, int num) { int[] temp = Arrays.copyOf(dp, 3); for (int s : temp) { dp[(s + num) % 3] = Math.max(dp[(s + num) % 3], s + num); } } }

public class Solution { public String stoneGameIII(int[] stoneValue) { int n = stoneValue.length; int[] dp = new int[n + 1]; dp[n] = 0; for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) { dp[i] = Integer.MIN_VALUE; for (int j = 0, curr = 0; j < 3 && i + j < n; ++j) { curr += stoneValue[i + j]; dp[i] = Math.max(dp[i], curr - dp[i + j + 1]); } } return dp[0] == 0 ? "Tie " : dp[0] > 0 ? "Alice " : "Bob "; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; class Solution { public void generateStrings(int n, StringBuilder current, List strings) { if (n == 0) { strings.add(current.toString()); return; } for (char c = 'a'; c <= 'c'; ++c) { if (current.length() == 0 || current.charAt(current.length() - 1) != c) { current.append(c); generateStrings(n - 1, current, strings); current.deleteCharAt(current.length() - 1); } } // Inline getHappyString helper method if (n == 0 && k <= strings.size()) { System.out.println(strings.get(k - 1)); } } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public String reformat(String s) { Queue letters = new LinkedList<>(); Queue digits = new LinkedList<>(); for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (Character.isLetter(c)) letters.add(c); else digits.add(c); } if (Math.abs(letters.size() - digits.size()) > 1) return ""; StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder(); boolean useLetter = letters.size() > digits.size(); while ((isConditionMet = !letters.isEmpty() || !digits.isEmpty())) { if (useLetter) { result.append(letters.poll()); } else { result.append(digits.poll()); } useLetter = !useLetter; } return result.toString(); } }

import java.util.ArrayDeque; import java.util.Deque; public class Solution { public int longestSubarray(int[] nums, int limit) { Deque maxDeque = new ArrayDeque<>(); Deque minDeque = new ArrayDeque<>(); int left = 0, right = 0, longest = 0; while (right < nums.length) { // Maintain the deque in decreasing order while (!maxDeque.isEmpty() && nums[right] > maxDeque.peekLast()) { maxDeque.pollLast(); } // Maintain the deque in increasing order while (!minDeque.isEmpty() && nums[right] < minDeque.peekLast()) { minDeque.pollLast(); } maxDeque.offerLast(nums[right]); minDeque.offerLast(nums[right]); // Adjust the window if it violates the limit while (maxDeque.peekFirst() - minDeque.peekFirst() > limit) { if (nums[left] == maxDeque.peekFirst()) { maxDeque.pollFirst(); } if (nums[left] == minDeque.peekFirst()) { minDeque.pollFirst(); } left++; } // Update the longest subarray length longest = Math.max(longest, right - left + 1); right++; } return longest; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.ArrayList; public class Solution { public List checkIfPrerequisite(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites, int[][] queries) { boolean[][] adj_matrix = new boolean[numCourses][numCourses]; for (int[] pre : prerequisites) { adj_matrix[pre[0]][pre[1]] = true; } // Consolidate the loops into a single pass for (int k = 0; k < numCourses; k++) { for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < numCourses && j < numCourses;) { if (!adj_matrix[i][j]) { adj_matrix[i][j] = adj_matrix[i][k] && adj_matrix[k][j]; } if (++j == numCourses) { i++; j = 0; } } } List answer = new ArrayList<>(); for (int[] query : queries) { answer.add(adj_matrix[query[0]][query[1]]); } return answer; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public int maxSumBST(TreeNode root) { int[] maxSum = new int[1]; if (root == null) { return 0; } int[] left = helper(root.left, maxSum); int[] right = helper(root.right, maxSum); if (left[3] != 0 && right[3] != 0 && root.val > left[1] && root.val < right[0]) { int sum = root.val + left[2] + right[2]; maxSum[0] = Math.max(maxSum[0], sum); return new int[]{Math.min(root.val, left[0]), Math.max(root.val, right[1]), sum, 1}; } return new int[]{0, 0, 0, 0}; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findLeastNumOfUniqueInts(int[] arr, int k) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); PriorityQueue> pq = new PriorityQueue<>((a, b) -> a.getValue().compareTo(b.getValue())); for (int n : arr) { count.put(n, count.getOrDefault(n, 0) + 1); } for (Map.Entry entry : count.entrySet()) { pq.add(entry); } while (k > 0 && !pq.isEmpty()) { k -= pq.poll().getValue(); } return k == 0 ? pq.size() : pq.size() + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int countPrefixAligned(int[] flips) { return computeCountPrefixAligned(flips); } private int computeCountPrefixAligned(int[] flips) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < flips.length; i++) { if (flips[i] == i + 1) { count++; } } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int numSubmat(int[][] mat) { int m = mat.length, n = mat[0].length; int[][] dp = new int[m][n]; int ans = 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (mat[i][j] == 1) { dp[i][j] = j == 0 ? 1 : dp[i][j-1] + 1; int width = dp[i][j]; for (int k = i, count = 0; k >= 0 && mat[k][j] != 0; k--) { width = Math.min(width, dp[k][j]); ans += ++count * width; } } } } return ans; } }

public class Solution { public int closestToTarget(int[] arr, int target) { int minDiff = Integer.MAX_VALUE; Set prefix = new HashSet<>(); for (int n : arr) { Set nextPrefix = computeNextPrefix(prefix, n); updateMinDifference(minDiff, nextPrefix, target); prefix = nextPrefix; } return minDiff; } private Set computeNextPrefix(Set prefix, int n) { Set nextPrefix = new HashSet<>(); for (int p : prefix) { nextPrefix.add(p & n); } nextPrefix.add(n); return nextPrefix; } private void updateMinDifference(int minDiff, Set nextPrefix, int target) { for (int p : nextPrefix) { minDiff = Math.min(minDiff, Math.abs(p - target)); } } }

public class Solution { public int maxNonOverlapping(int[] nums, int target) { Map prefixSum = new HashMap<>(); int sum = 0, count = 0; prefixSum.put(0, 0); List sums = Arrays.stream(nums) .map(num -> { sum += num; return sum; }) .filter(sum -> prefixSum.containsKey(sum - target)) .collect(Collectors.toList()); for (int s : sums) { count = Math.max(count, 1 + prefixSum.get(s - target)); } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int maxBoxesInWarehouse(int[] boxes, int[] warehouse) { int colCount = warehouse.length; for (int i = 1; i < colCount; i++) warehouse[i] = Math.min(warehouse[i], warehouse[i - 1]); Arrays.sort(boxes); int boxIndex = boxes.length - 1; int boxesCount = 0; for (int i = 0; i < colCount && boxIndex >= 0; i++) { if (boxes[boxIndex] <= warehouse[i]) { boxesCount++; boxIndex--; } } return boxesCount; } }
public class Solution { public int sumOddLengthSubarrays(int[] arr) { int sum = 0, n = arr.length; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { sum += arr[i] * ((i + 1) * (n - i) + 1) / 2; } return sum; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isPrintable(int[][] targetGrid) { int m = targetGrid.length, n = targetGrid[0].length; Map colorBounds = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) { for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { int color = targetGrid[i][j]; colorBounds.putIfAbsent(color, new int[] {i, j, i, j}); colorBounds.get(color)[0] = Math.min(colorBounds.get(color)[0], i); colorBounds.get(color)[1] = Math.min(colorBounds.get(color)[1], j); colorBounds.get(color)[2] = Math.max(colorBounds.get(color)[2], i); colorBounds.get(color)[3] = Math.max(colorBounds.get(color)[3], j); } } Set remainingColors = new HashSet<>(colorBounds.keySet()); while (!remainingColors.isEmpty()) { for (Iterator it = remainingColors.iterator(); it.hasNext();) { int color = it.next(); int[] bounds = colorBounds.get(color); boolean contained = true; for (int i = bounds[0]; i <= bounds[2] && contained; ++i) { for (int j = bounds[1]; j <= bounds[3]; ++j) { if (targetGrid[i][j] != color && targetGrid[i][j] != -1) { contained = false; break; } } } if (contained) { for (int i = bounds[0]; i <= bounds[2]; ++i) { for (int j = bounds[1]; j <= bounds[3]; ++j) { targetGrid[i][j] = -1; } } it.remove(); } else { return false; } } } return true; } }
public class Solution { public int minOperations(String[] logs) { return (int) Arrays.stream(logs) .filter(log -> !log.equals("./")) .mapToInt(log -> log.equals("../") ? -1 : 1) .sum(); } }

public class Solution { public int minOperationsMaxProfit(int[] customers, int boardingCost, int runningCost) { return computeMinOperationsMaxProfit(customers, boardingCost, runningCost); } private int computeMinOperationsMaxProfit(int[] customers, int boardingCost, int runningCost) { int waiting = 0; int profit = 0; int max_profit = 0; int rotations = 0; int result = -1; for (int i = 0; i < customers.length || waiting > 0; ++i) { if (i < customers.length) { waiting += customers[i]; } int boarding = Math.min(waiting, 4); waiting -= boarding; profit += boarding * boardingCost - runningCost; if (profit > max_profit) { max_profit = profit; result = rotations + 1; } rotations++; } return result; } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean isEvenOddTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return false; Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(root); int level = 0; while (!queue.isEmpty()) { int size = queue.size(); Integer prevVal = (level % 2 == 0) ? 0 : 1000001; // Check values in the current level for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) { TreeNode curr = queue.poll(); if ((level % 2 == 0 && (curr.val % 2 == 0 || curr.val <= prevVal)) || (level % 2 != 0 && (curr.val % 2 != 0 || curr.val >= prevVal))) { return false; } prevVal = curr.val; if (curr.left != null) queue.offer(curr.left); if (curr.right != null) queue.offer(curr.right); } level++; } return true; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public boolean canMakeArithmeticProgression(int[] arr) { Arrays.sort(arr); for (int i = 2; i < arr.length; i++) { if (arr[i] - arr[i - 1] != arr[1] - arr[0]) { return false; } } return true; } }

public class Solution { public int countVowelStrings(int n) { int[] dpTable = {1, 1, 1, 1, 1}; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 3; j >= 0; j--) { dpTable[j] = dpTable[j] + dpTable[j + 1]; } } return Arrays.stream(dpTable).sum(); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Collections; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public boolean canDistribute(int[] nums, int[] quantity) { Map counts = new HashMap<>(); for (int num : nums) { counts.put(num, counts.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1); } List values = new ArrayList<>(counts.values()); Arrays.sort(values, Collections.reverseOrder()); return dfs(0, values, quantity); } private boolean dfs(int index, List values, int[] quantity) { if (index == quantity.length) { return true; } for (int i = 0; i < values.size(); i++) { if (values.get(i) >= quantity[index]) { values.set(i, values.get(i) - quantity[index]); boolean result = dfs(index + 1, values, quantity); values.set(i, values.get(i) + quantity[index]); if (result) return true; } } return false; } }

public class Solution { int longestAwesomeSubstring(String s) { int n = s.length(); int maxLen = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { Set seenChars = new HashSet<>(); boolean isOddCountOne = true; for (int j = i; j <= n; ++j) { if (j > i && s.charAt(j - 1) != 'a') { // Assuming the string contains only lowercase letters char c = s.charAt(j - 1); if (!seenChars.contains(c)) { seenChars.add(c); } else { seenChars.remove(c); } } isOddCountOne &= (seenChars.size() <= 1); maxLen = Math.max(maxLen, j - i * isOddCountOne); } } return maxLen; } boolean isAwesome(String s) { int odd_count = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { freq[c - 'a']++; } for (int i = 0; i < 26; i++) { if (freq[i] % 2 == 1) { odd_count++; } } return (odd_count <= 1); } }

public class Solution { public int stoneGameV(int[] stoneValue) { int colCount = stoneValue.length; int[][] memo = new int[colCount][colCount]; return maxScore(stoneValue, 0, colCount - 1, memo); } private int maxScore(int[] stoneValue, int start, int end, int[][] memo) { if (start == end) return 0; if (memo[start][end] != 0) return memo[start][end]; int leftSum = 0, rightSum = 0; for (int i = start; i < end; ++i) { leftSum += stoneValue[i]; rightSum = 0; for (int j = i + 1; j <= end; ++j) rightSum += stoneValue[j]; if (leftSum > rightSum) memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], rightSum + maxScore(stoneValue, i + 1, end, memo)); else if (leftSum < rightSum) memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], leftSum + maxScore(stoneValue, start, i, memo)); else memo[start][end] = Math.max(memo[start][end], leftSum + Math.max(maxScore(stoneValue, start, i, memo), maxScore(stoneValue, i + 1, end, memo))); } return memo[start][end]; } }

entries.instruction: Extract the magic number 1000000007 in the numPrimeArrangements method into a named constant at the class level as a static final field. Replace every occurrence of 1000000007 with the new constant name.

llm_calls.raw_response: public class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public int numPrimeArrangements(int n) { boolean[] isPrime = new boolean[n + 1]; Arrays.fill(isPrime, true); isPrime[0] = false; isPrime[1] = false; for (int i = 2; i * i <= n; i++) { if (isPrime[i]) { for (int j = i * i; j <= n; j += i) { isPrime[j] = false; } } } int primeCount = 0; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { if (isPrime[i]) primeCount++; } int compositeCount = n - primeCount; long res = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= primeCount; i++) { res = res * i % MOD; } for (int i = 1; i <= compositeCount; i++) { res = res * i % MOD; } return (int) res; } }

public class Solution { public int countLetters(String s) { int count = 0, current = 1; int sum; for (int i = 1; i < s.length(); i++) { if (s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(i - 1)) { current++; } else { sum = (current * (current + 1)) / 2; count += sum; current = 1; } } sum = (current * (current + 1)) / 2; count += sum; return count; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List shortestDistance(int[] colors, int[][] queries) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); List> positions = new ArrayList<>(3); for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) { positions.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) { positions.get(colors[i] - 1).add(i); } for (int[] query : queries) { List indexPositions = positions.get(query[1] - 1); if (!indexPositions.isEmpty()) { int dist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int pos : indexPositions) { dist = Math.min(dist, Math.abs(pos - query[0])); } result.add(dist); } else { result.add(-1); } } return result; } }

import java.util.PriorityQueue; public class Solution { public int minBuildTime(int[] blocks, int split) { PriorityQueue pq = new PriorityQueue<>(); for (int block : blocks) { pq.add(block); } while (pq.size() > 1) { int a = pq.poll(); int b = pq.poll(); pq.add(b + split); } return pq.poll(); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> minimumAbsDifference(int[] array) { Arrays.sort(array); int minDiff = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { minDiff = Math.min(minDiff, array[i] - array[i - 1]); } List> result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 1; i < array.length; i++) { if (array[i] - array[i - 1] == minDiff) { result.add(Arrays.asList(array[i - 1], array[i])); } } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int nthUglyNumber(int n, int a, int b, int c) { long left = 1, right = (long) 2e9; while (left < right) { long mid = left + (right - left) / 2; long gcd_ab = gcd(a, b), gcd_ac = gcd(a, c), gcd_bc = gcd(b, c); long lcm_ab = a / gcd_ab * b, lcm_ac = a / gcd_ac * c, lcm_bc = b / gcd_bc * c, lcm_abc = a / gcd_ab * lcm_bc; long count = mid / a + mid / b + mid / c - mid / lcm_ab - mid / lcm_ac - mid / lcm_bc + mid / lcm_abc; if (count < n) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return (int) left; long gcd(long a, long b) { return b == 0 ? a : gcd(b, a % b); } } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public String smallestStringWithSwaps(String s, int[][] pairs) { int n = s.length(); int[] p = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { p[i] = i; } Map> groups = new HashMap<>(); for (int[] pair : pairs) { int root1 = find(pair[0], p); int root2 = find(pair[1], p); if (root1 != root2) { p[root2] = root1; } } for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int root = find(i, p); groups.computeIfAbsent(root, k -> new PriorityQueue<>()).add(s.charAt(i)); } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { int root = find(i, p); sb.append(groups.get(root).poll()); } return sb.toString(); } private int find(int x, int[] p) { if (p[x] != x) { p[x] = find(p[x], p); } return p[x]; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode() {} TreeNode(int val) { this.val = val; } TreeNode(int val, TreeNode left, TreeNode right) { this.val = val; this.left = left; this.right = right; } } public class Solution { public boolean twoSumBSTs(TreeNode root1, TreeNode root2, int target) { Set set = new HashSet<>(); buildSet(root1, set); if (root2 == null) return false; if (set.contains(target - root2.val)) return true; return findPair(root2.left, target, set) || findPair(root2.right, target, set); } private void buildSet(TreeNode root, Set set) { if (root == null) return; set.add(root.val); buildSet(root.left, set); buildSet(root.right, set); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List removeSubfolders(String[] folder) { return Arrays.stream(folder) .sorted() .filter(path -> !path.startsWith("/")) .collect(Collectors.toList()); } }

public class Solution { public String alphabetBoardPath(String target) { int x = 0, y = 0; StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (char c : target.toCharArray()) { int dx = (c - 'a') / 5; int dy = (c - 'a') % 5; // Move up while (x > dx) { sb.append('U'); x--; } // Move left while (y > dy) { sb.append('L'); y--; } // Move down while (x < dx) { sb.append('D'); x++; } // Move right while (y < dy) { sb.append('R'); y++; } sb.append('!'); } return sb.toString(); } }

public class Solution { public int minimumMoves(int[] array) { int[][] dpTable = new int[array.length][array.length]; for (int[] row : dpTable) Arrays.fill(row, -1); return minRemovals(array, 0, array.length - 1, dpTable); } private int minRemovals(int[] array, int i, int j, int[][] dpTable) { if (i > j) return 0; if (i == j) return 1; if (dpTable[i][j] != -1) return dpTable[i][j]; int result = minRemovals(array, i + 1, j, dpTable) + 1; for (int k = i + 1; k <= j; k++) { if (array[i] == array[k]) result = Math.min(result, minRemovals(array, i + 1, k - 1, dpTable) + minRemovals(array, k + 1, j, dpTable)); } return dpTable[i][j] = result; } }

class Solution { public boolean isGoodArray(int[] nums) { int res = nums[0]; for (int num : nums) { res = num == 0 ? a : gcd(res, num); } return res == 1; private int gcd(int a, int b) { return b == 0 ? a : gcd(b, a % b); } } }

public class Solution { public int closedIsland(int[][] grid) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < grid.length; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < grid[0].length; j++) { boolean isMatch = grid[i][j] == 0 && dfs(grid, i, j); if (isMatch) { count++; } } } return count; } private boolean dfs(int[][] grid, int i, int j) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= grid.length || j >= grid[0].length) { return false; } if (grid[i][j] == 1) { return true; } grid[i][j] = 1; boolean up = dfs(grid, i - 1, j); boolean down = dfs(grid, i + 1, j); boolean left = dfs(grid, i, j - 1); boolean right = dfs(grid, i, j + 1); return up && down && left && right; } }

public class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public int numberOfWays(int numPeople) { int[] dp = new int[numPeople / 2 + 1]; dp[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= numPeople / 2; ++i) { for (int j = 1; j <= i; ++j) { dp[i] = (dp[i] + (int)(((long) dp[i - j] * dp[j - 1]) % MOD )) % MOD; } } return dp[numPeople / 2]; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public List> groupThePeople(int[] groupSizes) { Map> groups = new HashMap<>(); List> result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < groupSizes.length; i++) { computeGroupThePeople(groups, groupSizes[i], i); } return result; } private void computeGroupThePeople(Map> groups, int size, int index) { groups.computeIfAbsent(size, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(index); if (groups.get(size).size() == size) { groupSizes[index] = -1; // Mark as processed } } }

import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; class Solution { private static final int MOD = 1000000007; public List pathsWithMaxScore(List board) { int n = board.size(); int[][] dp = new int[n][n]; int[][] cnt = new int[n][n]; board.set(0, "0" + board.get(0).substring(1)); board.set(n-1, board.get(n-1).substring(0, n - 1) + "0"); cnt[n-1][n-1] = 1; for (int i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) { for (int j = n-1; j >= 0; j--) { if (board.get(i).charAt(j) != 'X') { int[][] neighbors = {{i-1, j}, {i, j-1}, {i-1, j-1}}; for (int[] neighbor : neighbors) { int x = neighbor[0], y = neighbor[1]; if(x >= 0 && y >= 0) { if (dp[i][j] < dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0') { dp[i][j] = dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0'; cnt[i][j] = cnt[x][y]; } else if (dp[i][j] == dp[x][y] + board.get(i).charAt(j) - '0') { cnt[i][j] = (cnt[i][j] + cnt[x][y]) % MOD; } } } } } } return Arrays.asList(dp[0][0], cnt[0][0]); } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public int minSetSize(int[] arr) { Map freq_map = new HashMap<>(); for (int x : arr) freq_map.put(x, freq_map.getOrDefault(x, 0) + 1); int half = arr.length / 2; int cnt = 0; int size = 0; for (int cnt_val : freq_map.values()) { if ((size += cnt_val) >= half) return ++cnt; } return cnt; } }

public class Solution { int[] dx = {-1, 1, 0, 0}; int[] dy = {0, 0, -1, 1}; void dfs(int[][] grid, int x, int y) { int n = grid.length, m = grid[0].length; grid[x][y] = 1; for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) { int nx = x + dx[i], ny = y + dy[i]; if (nx >= 0 && nx < n && ny >= 0 && ny < m && grid[nx][ny] == 0) { dfs(grid, nx, ny); } } } public int closedIsland(int[][] grid) { int n = grid.length, m = grid[0].length; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < m; j++) { if (i == 0 || i == n - 1 || j == 0 || j == m - 1) { if (grid[i][j] == 0) { dfs(grid, i, j); } return 0; } } } int res = 0; for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < m - 1; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 0) { dfs(grid, i, j); res++; } } } return res; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode() {} TreeNode(int val) { this.val = val; } TreeNode(int val, TreeNode left, TreeNode right) { this.val = val; this.left = left; this.right = right; } } class Solution { public TreeNode balanceBST(TreeNode root) { List sortedNodes = new ArrayList<>(); inorderTraversal(root, sortedNodes); if (sortedNodes.isEmpty()) return null; int mid = sortedNodes.size() / 2; TreeNode newNode = sortedNodes.get(mid); newNode.left = balanceBST(sortedNodes.subList(0, mid)); newNode.right = balanceBST(sortedNodes.subList(mid + 1, sortedNodes.size())); return newNode; } private void inorderTraversal(TreeNode node, List sortedNodes) { if (node == null) return; inorderTraversal(node.left, sortedNodes); sortedNodes.add(node); inorderTraversal(node.right, sortedNodes); } }

public class Solution { public int findTheDistanceValue(int[] arr1, int[] arr2, int d) { for (int a : arr1) { boolean found = false; for (int b : arr2) { if (Math.abs(a - b) <= d) { return 0; // Early return when condition is met } } } return arr1.length; // Return the length of arr1 if no early return occurred } }

public class Solution { public int maxSumDivThree(int[] nums) { int[] dp = new int[3]; for (int num : nums) { updateDP(dp, num); } return dp[0]; } private void updateDP(int[] dp, int num) { int[] temp = Arrays.copyOf(dp, 3); for (int s : temp) { dp[(s + num) % 3] = Math.max(dp[(s + num) % 3], s + num); } } }

public class Solution { public String stoneGameIII(int[] stoneValue) { int n = stoneValue.length; int[] dp = new int[n + 1]; dp[n] = 0; for (int i = n - 1; i >= 0; --i) { dp[i] = Integer.MIN_VALUE; for (int j = 0, curr = 0; j < 3 && i + j < n; ++j) { curr += stoneValue[i + j]; dp[i] = Math.max(dp[i], curr - dp[i + j + 1]); } } return dp[0] == 0 ? "Tie " : dp[0] > 0 ? "Alice " : "Bob "; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; class Solution { public void generateStrings(int n, StringBuilder current, List strings) { if (n == 0) { strings.add(current.toString()); return; } for (char c = 'a'; c <= 'c'; ++c) { if (current.length() == 0 || current.charAt(current.length() - 1) != c) { current.append(c); generateStrings(n - 1, current, strings); current.deleteCharAt(current.length() - 1); } } // Inline getHappyString helper method if (n == 0 && k <= strings.size()) { System.out.println(strings.get(k - 1)); } } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public String reformat(String s) { Queue letters = new LinkedList<>(); Queue digits = new LinkedList<>(); for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (Character.isLetter(c)) letters.add(c); else digits.add(c); } if (Math.abs(letters.size() - digits.size()) > 1) return ""; StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder(); boolean useLetter = letters.size() > digits.size(); while ((isConditionMet = !letters.isEmpty() || !digits.isEmpty())) { if (useLetter) { result.append(letters.poll()); } else { result.append(digits.poll()); } useLetter = !useLetter; } return result.toString(); } }

import java.util.ArrayDeque; import java.util.Deque; public class Solution { public int longestSubarray(int[] nums, int limit) { Deque maxDeque = new ArrayDeque<>(); Deque minDeque = new ArrayDeque<>(); int left = 0, right = 0, longest = 0; while (right < nums.length) { // Maintain the deque in decreasing order while (!maxDeque.isEmpty() && nums[right] > maxDeque.peekLast()) { maxDeque.pollLast(); } // Maintain the deque in increasing order while (!minDeque.isEmpty() && nums[right] < minDeque.peekLast()) { minDeque.pollLast(); } maxDeque.offerLast(nums[right]); minDeque.offerLast(nums[right]); // Adjust the window if it violates the limit while (maxDeque.peekFirst() - minDeque.peekFirst() > limit) { if (nums[left] == maxDeque.peekFirst()) { maxDeque.pollFirst(); } if (nums[left] == minDeque.peekFirst()) { minDeque.pollFirst(); } left++; } // Update the longest subarray length longest = Math.max(longest, right - left + 1); right++; } return longest; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.ArrayList; public class Solution { public List checkIfPrerequisite(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites, int[][] queries) { boolean[][] adj_matrix = new boolean[numCourses][numCourses]; for (int[] pre : prerequisites) { adj_matrix[pre[0]][pre[1]] = true; } // Consolidate the loops into a single pass for (int k = 0; k < numCourses; k++) { for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < numCourses && j < numCourses;) { if (!adj_matrix[i][j]) { adj_matrix[i][j] = adj_matrix[i][k] && adj_matrix[k][j]; } if (++j == numCourses) { i++; j = 0; } } } List answer = new ArrayList<>(); for (int[] query : queries) { answer.add(adj_matrix[query[0]][query[1]]); } return answer; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public int maxSumBST(TreeNode root) { int[] maxSum = new int[1]; if (root == null) { return 0; } int[] left = helper(root.left, maxSum); int[] right = helper(root.right, maxSum); if (left[3] != 0 && right[3] != 0 && root.val > left[1] && root.val < right[0]) { int sum = root.val + left[2] + right[2]; maxSum[0] = Math.max(maxSum[0], sum); return new int[]{Math.min(root.val, left[0]), Math.max(root.val, right[1]), sum, 1}; } return new int[]{0, 0, 0, 0}; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findLeastNumOfUniqueInts(int[] arr, int k) { Map count = new HashMap<>(); PriorityQueue> pq = new PriorityQueue<>((a, b) -> a.getValue().compareTo(b.getValue())); for (int n : arr) { count.put(n, count.getOrDefault(n, 0) + 1); } for (Map.Entry entry : count.entrySet()) { pq.add(entry); } while (k > 0 && !pq.isEmpty()) { k -= pq.poll().getValue(); } return k == 0 ? pq.size() : pq.size() + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int countPrefixAligned(int[] flips) { return computeCountPrefixAligned(flips); } private int computeCountPrefixAligned(int[] flips) { int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < flips.length; i++) { if (flips[i] == i + 1) { count++; } } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int numSubmat(int[][] mat) { int m = mat.length, n = mat[0].length; int[][] dp = new int[m][n]; int ans = 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (mat[i][j] == 1) { dp[i][j] = j == 0 ? 1 : dp[i][j-1] + 1; int width = dp[i][j]; for (int k = i, count = 0; k >= 0 && mat[k][j] != 0; k--) { width = Math.min(width, dp[k][j]); ans += ++count * width; } } } } return ans; } }

public class Solution { public int closestToTarget(int[] arr, int target) { int minDiff = Integer.MAX_VALUE; Set prefix = new HashSet<>(); for (int n : arr) { Set nextPrefix = computeNextPrefix(prefix, n); updateMinDifference(minDiff, nextPrefix, target); prefix = nextPrefix; } return minDiff; } private Set computeNextPrefix(Set prefix, int n) { Set nextPrefix = new HashSet<>(); for (int p : prefix) { nextPrefix.add(p & n); } nextPrefix.add(n); return nextPrefix; } private void updateMinDifference(int minDiff, Set nextPrefix, int target) { for (int p : nextPrefix) { minDiff = Math.min(minDiff, Math.abs(p - target)); } } }

public class Solution { public int maxNonOverlapping(int[] nums, int target) { Map prefixSum = new HashMap<>(); int sum = 0, count = 0; prefixSum.put(0, 0); List sums = Arrays.stream(nums) .map(num -> { sum += num; return sum; }) .filter(sum -> prefixSum.containsKey(sum - target)) .collect(Collectors.toList()); for (int s : sums) { count = Math.max(count, 1 + prefixSum.get(s - target)); } return count; } }

public class Solution { public int maxBoxesInWarehouse(int[] boxes, int[] warehouse) { int colCount = warehouse.length; for (int i = 1; i < colCount; i++) warehouse[i] = Math.min(warehouse[i], warehouse[i - 1]); Arrays.sort(boxes); int boxIndex = boxes.length - 1; int boxesCount = 0; for (int i = 0; i < colCount && boxIndex >= 0; i++) { if (boxes[boxIndex] <= warehouse[i]) { boxesCount++; boxIndex--; } } return boxesCount; } }
public class Solution { public int sumOddLengthSubarrays(int[] arr) { int sum = 0, n = arr.length; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { sum += arr[i] * ((i + 1) * (n - i) + 1) / 2; } return sum; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isPrintable(int[][] targetGrid) { int m = targetGrid.length, n = targetGrid[0].length; Map colorBounds = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) { for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { int color = targetGrid[i][j]; colorBounds.putIfAbsent(color, new int[] {i, j, i, j}); colorBounds.get(color)[0] = Math.min(colorBounds.get(color)[0], i); colorBounds.get(color)[1] = Math.min(colorBounds.get(color)[1], j); colorBounds.get(color)[2] = Math.max(colorBounds.get(color)[2], i); colorBounds.get(color)[3] = Math.max(colorBounds.get(color)[3], j); } } Set remainingColors = new HashSet<>(colorBounds.keySet()); while (!remainingColors.isEmpty()) { for (Iterator it = remainingColors.iterator(); it.hasNext();) { int color = it.next(); int[] bounds = colorBounds.get(color); boolean contained = true; for (int i = bounds[0]; i <= bounds[2] && contained; ++i) { for (int j = bounds[1]; j <= bounds[3]; ++j) { if (targetGrid[i][j] != color && targetGrid[i][j] != -1) { contained = false; break; } } } if (contained) { for (int i = bounds[0]; i <= bounds[2]; ++i) { for (int j = bounds[1]; j <= bounds[3]; ++j) { targetGrid[i][j] = -1; } } it.remove(); } else { return false; } } } return true; } }
public class Solution { public int minOperations(String[] logs) { return (int) Arrays.stream(logs) .filter(log -> !log.equals("./")) .mapToInt(log -> log.equals("../") ? -1 : 1) .sum(); } }

public class Solution { public int minOperationsMaxProfit(int[] customers, int boardingCost, int runningCost) { return computeMinOperationsMaxProfit(customers, boardingCost, runningCost); } private int computeMinOperationsMaxProfit(int[] customers, int boardingCost, int runningCost) { int waiting = 0; int profit = 0; int max_profit = 0; int rotations = 0; int result = -1; for (int i = 0; i < customers.length || waiting > 0; ++i) { if (i < customers.length) { waiting += customers[i]; } int boarding = Math.min(waiting, 4); waiting -= boarding; profit += boarding * boardingCost - runningCost; if (profit > max_profit) { max_profit = profit; result = rotations + 1; } rotations++; } return result; } }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean isEvenOddTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return false; Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(root); int level = 0; while (!queue.isEmpty()) { int size = queue.size(); Integer prevVal = (level % 2 == 0) ? 0 : 1000001; // Check values in the current level for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) { TreeNode curr = queue.poll(); if ((level % 2 == 0 && (curr.val % 2 == 0 || curr.val <= prevVal)) || (level % 2 != 0 && (curr.val % 2 != 0 || curr.val >= prevVal))) { return false; } prevVal = curr.val; if (curr.left != null) queue.offer(curr.left); if (curr.right != null) queue.offer(curr.right); } level++; } return true; } }

import java.util.Arrays; public class Solution { public boolean canMakeArithmeticProgression(int[] arr) { Arrays.sort(arr); for (int i = 2; i < arr.length; i++) { if (arr[i] - arr[i - 1] != arr[1] - arr[0]) { return false; } } return true; } }

public class Solution { public int countVowelStrings(int n) { int[] dpTable = {1, 1, 1, 1, 1}; for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 3; j >= 0; j--) { dpTable[j] = dpTable[j] + dpTable[j + 1]; } } return Arrays.stream(dpTable).sum(); } }
